name: Mr Pibb Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 2 to 3 cups of pecan halves.
2. Cook sugars and Mr. Pibb in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly, then gradually bring to the soft ball stage (240 degrees F on candy thermometer).
3. Remove mixture from heat; stir in marshmallows and pecans. Mix vigorously until marshmallows dissolve.
4. Quickly drop by tablespoon on wax paper to cool.
Makes 2 dozen pralines.
NOTE: If Mr Pibb is not available in your area, use Dr. Pepper.
